recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Metal Lords
recommendations.overview: For teenage misfits Hunter and Kevin, the path to glory is clear: Devote themselves to metal. Win Battle of the Bands. And be worshipped like gods.

recommendations.title: House Party
recommendations.overview: Aspiring club promoters and best buds Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads—and freshly fired from their low-lift jobs as house cleaners—the pair needs a huge

recommendations.title: A Very Jonas Christmas Movie
recommendations.overview: Kevin, Nick, and Joe Jonas face a series of escalating obstacles as they struggle to make it from London to New York in time to spend Christmas with their families.

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: Big Fan

recommendations.title: Better Nate Than Ever

recommendations.title: Day Shift
recommendations.overview: An LA vampire hunter has a week to come up with the cash to pay for his kid's tuition and braces. Trying to make a living these days just might kill him.

recommendations.title: Ana e Vitória
recommendations.overview: Two girls have a chance encounter and instantly befriend. While trying to find themselves, they decide to pursue music together.
